productDisplayName: Quiksilver Unisex Black & Green Duffle Bag
description: Style Note A fusion of style and functionality, this duffel bag from quiksilver is perfect for your travel gear. The deep compartment is capable of accommodating all your essential accessories and the stitching and finishing are excellent. So, just fill it with your essentials and escape the city in style. Product Details Dark grey bag with blue and green pattern, has a large and roomy main compartment Two short handles and a detachable shoulder strap One compartment in front and one on the side with a velcro closureBrand name embroidered on the front Material and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when needed Size Height: 25 cmWidth: 55 cmDepth: 32 cm
